title: (2PK) Gear Aid Tent Waterproofing Spray and Sealer for Nylon Tents Fast Cure Kit
description:
Need a simple and effective solution to tent waterproofing? Use Revivex Instant Water Repellent, a spray-on formula that immediately creates a protective barrier against water, oil and stains. Pair it with Seam Grip TF or Seam Grip FC to protect your tent from top to bottom. Choose the tent “waterproofer” kit that’s right for you. Ideal for treating small and large family-size tents, Seam Grip FC seals up to 60 linear ft of seams and cures in 2-4 hours. Seam Grip TF fabric sealant also cures within 4 hours and covers up to 85 sq ft of tent floor or rainfly. From tents to boots, our multipurpose water repellent, Revivex Instant works on nylon, leather, GORE-TEX® fabric, eVent® and other waterproof-breathable materials
Deals Only Web Store
Our Store

(2PK) Gear Aid Tent Waterproofing Spray and Sealer for Nylon Tents Fast Cure Kit

Need a simple and effective solution to tent waterproofing? Use Revivex Instant Water Repellent, a spray-on formula that immediately creates a protective barrier against water, oil and stains.

Key Features

  • Stop leaks in your rainfly, tent seams/floor with a GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Kit; all kits include Revivex Instant Water Repellent, a breathable, silicone-free formula
  • Add repellency to the rainfly, sleeping bags, leather boots, and GORE-TEX jackets with Revivex Instant (5 oz spray can)
  • Use the Seam Seal Kit to waterproof a rainfly and seal leaky seams in under 4 hours with a fast-curing sealant, Seam Grip FC; 2 fl oz bottle covers up to 60 ft of seams
  • Use the Floor Seal Kit to add water repellency to a rainfly and seal tent floor leaks with a new PU coating, Seam Grip TF; the 4 fl oz bottle covers up to 85 sq ft of fabric
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 20424
  • UPC: 021563204247
  • Color: Clear

From tents to boots, this multipurpose water repellent, Revivex Instant works on nylon, leather, GORE-TEX® fabric, eVent® and other waterproof-breathable materials. With GEAR AID Tent Waterproofing Kits, moisture and discomfort inside tents will be a distant memory.

Pair it with Seam Grip TF or Seam Grip FC to protect your tent from top to bottom.

Choose the tent “waterproofer” kit that’s right for you. Ideal for treating small and large family-size tents, Seam Grip FC seals up to 60 linear ft of seams and cures in 2-4 hours. Seam Grip TF fabric sealant also cures within 4 hours and covers up to 85 sq ft of tent floor or rainfly.
